validation.nameTooLong: Name cannot be longer than 255 characters.
validation.endDateBeforeStart: End date cannot be earlier than the start date.
validation.endDateInFuture: End date cannot be in the future.
validation.locationTooLong: Location cannot be longer than 255 characters.
validation.fixErrors: Please fix the errors in the form.

form.finishedAlert: The construction will be marked as completed.

finish.title: Finish construction
finish.cannotFinishAlert: The construction cannot be finished because it hasn't started yet.

resume.title: Resume construction
resume.prompt: Are you sure you want to resume the construction?

delete.title: Delete construction
delete.confirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
delete.warningText: The construction will be deleted from the database along with all files and related information.
delete.alertText: This operation cannot be undone. Consider finishing the construction instead.
delete.promptName: To delete the construction, enter its full name below:

deleteSection.title: Delete construction
deleteSection.description: Permanently deletes the construction from the database. This operation cannot be undone.

errors.notFoundMessage: Construction not found. It may have been deleted or does not exist.

notifications.createError: An error occurred while creating the construction.
notifications.updateError: An error occurred while updating the construction.
